name: Carl Barron
bio: Carl Barron is an Australian observational comedian from Longreach, Queensland, who became one of the country's biggest-selling live and DVD comedians. His easygoing, everyman style built a large national following through extensive touring and television appearances. Several of his stand-up DVDs rank among the best-selling comedy releases in Australian history.

timeline.ev: Appears on Hey Hey It's Saturday
Releases the DVD Carl Barron Live
Whatever Comes Next wins Best International Show in NZ
Releases the special A One Ended Stick
Tours the show Drinking with a Fork

accolades: Best International Show, NZ Comedy Festival
ARIA Award nominee for a comedy DVD

bits.t: Carl Barron at Just for Laughs
